prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2021年第52→2022年第49→2023年第51→2024年第49→2025年第53→2026年第55名 ，近年排名略有下滑但整体稳定；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆表白墙事件）；抖音热度排名第102（一般），曝光量较低；未见明显投档断档记录，报 考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估：作物学A+、植物保护A+、食品科学与工程A、兽医学A-、畜牧学A-，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续高热，但农林类专业整体热度一般；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34000人（+1 9.7%），竞争加剧；南京农业大学位于江苏南京，非本省高校，在陕西省招生占比约0 .9%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素不突出。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年大幅扩招42.6%以及本省物理类考生增加19.7%等因素，扩招幅度大于考生 增幅，预计竞争略有缓解，但位次仍高于2025年基准；预测最低位次约31914名，区间31414–32414名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 18448 → 27639 → 22557 → 20685 → 25577, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to a gap, it dropped to 27639 and then gradually recovered. In 2025, it fell back to 25577. The average over the past three years is about 22900, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 25577. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 45 → 47 → 47 → 50 students, increasing to 54 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 77 students, an increase of 23 students (+42.6%) compared to 2025, indicating a substantial expansion and easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 52nd in 2021, 49th in 2022, 51st in 2023, 49th in 2024, 53rd in 2025, and 55th in 2026, showing a slight decline in recent years but overall stability. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident). On Douyin, its popularity ranking was 102nd (average), with low exposure. No obvious admission gaps were recorded, and application attention remained stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Crop Science and Plant Protection, A in Food Science and Engineering, A- in Veterinary Medicine, and A- in Animal Science, highlighting its distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remain highly popular in society, while agriculture and forestry majors generally have average popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in this province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,000 (+19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university, and its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no prominent regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant historical ranking fluctuations, a 42.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, and a 19.7% increase in local physics category examinees, the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate, suggesting a slight easing of competition, but the ranking will still be higher than the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 31914, with a range of 31414 to 32414.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 31414), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 10183 → 3409 → 4945 → 3892 → 3869. In 2021, the ranking was relatively high (10183), but from 2022 onward, it moved significantly forward to the 3400–5000 range, stabilizing in the past 4 years between 3400 and 5000. The baseline for 2025 is about 3869. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 8 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands significantly to 14 students, an increase of 6 (+75%) compared to 2025, representing a substantial expansion that greatly alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked 55th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a slight decline in recent years but overall stability. The 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. Douyin popularity ranking is 102nd (average), with relatively low exposure. No obvious record of enrollment gaps, and application attention is stable. Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-. Although it has strong agricultural and forestry characteristics, the direct relevance to liberal arts majors is relatively low.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially hot, but the university's liberal arts majors are mainly Sociology, Business Administration, and English, which are not the most popular directions. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 88,500, an increase of approximately 12,859 (+17.0%) compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition. Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university, and its enrollment share in Shaanxi's liberal arts category is very small, so regional preference factors are not prominent.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking range of 3400–5000 in the past 4 years, the significant 75% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the 17.0% increase in provincial history category examinees, the expansion far exceeds the growth in examinees, so competition is expected to ease noticeably, and the ranking will shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline (a larger ranking number means easier admission). The predicted minimum ranking is about 5510, with a range of 5010–6010.
